title: Grilled Brazilian Chicken with Elderflower Mustard
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish that combines the spices of Brazil with the tanginess of elderflower mustard. Perfect for a dinner party or special occasion.
instructions: Season the chicken with flaky sea salt and mustardy.
Grill the chicken for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through to an internal temperature of 165F.
Meanwhile, mix the elderflower mustard with a tablespoon of water to thin it out.
Brush the grilled chicken with the elderflower mustard during the last minute of cooking.
Let the chicken rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
